content_fingerprint: openai achieves fedramp moderate authorization for chatgpt enterprise and api openai has secured fedramp moderate authorization for chatgpt enterprise and the openai api clearing a key compliance hurdle for u s federal agencies deploying ai tools openai announced on april 27 2026 that chatgpt enterprise and the openai api have been authorized at the fedramp moderate level a standardized security assessment used by u s federal agencies to evaluate cloud services handling sensitive but unclassified data fedramp moderate is a higher bar than the more common low authorization requiring more rigoro
